title: [CI:DOCS] Benchmarks: new tool for parsing results
body:
New script for use with Valentin's benchmarks. Converts ginkgo
timing results to CSV format suitable for (TBI) saving and
comparing.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Sample results, based on a run on my laptop: [localbenchmarks.csv](https://github.com/containers/podman/files/8672276/localbenchmarks.csv)
